title: Element Link in Email Automatisierung

posts.author: fabianlehmann (Fabian Lehmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning,
we have created an automation that we always receive an email when an item is due.

I wish I could click on a link and then be taken to the item. The simplest would be an element link column that I could then insert in the automation in the email text. Or is there a workaround?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @fabianlehmann!

If you have set up an automation to be notified, you should have the option to open that specific item through the email - as shown in my screenshot below:

Screen Shot 2023-02-06 at 11.55.48 am856×544 20.6 KB

Is this not the case on your end? If so, would you be happy to share a screenshot of the notification you receive? Thanks!
